name: Applesauce-Spice Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter at medium speed with an electric mixer for about 2 minutes, or until soft and creamy.
2. Gradually add sugars, beating at medium speed for 5 to 7 minutes.
3. Add eggs, one at a time, beating just until the yellow color disappears.
4. Combine applesauce and baking soda; set aside.
5. Combine 2-3/4 cups flour and spices; add to butter mixture alternately with applesauce mixture, beginning and ending with the flour mixture. Mix on low speed just until blended after each addition.
6. Combine remaining 1/4 cup flour, raisins, and pecans; fold into batter.
7. Pour batter into a greased and floured 12-cup Bundt pan.
8. Bake at 325 degrees for 1 hour and 15 to 20 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Cool in pan on a wire rack for 10 to 15 minutes; remove from pan and let cool completely on a wire rack.
